task_summaries.task_scope: Analyze distributional differences and variance ratios of packet length features e8-e12 conditioned on class labels to identify structural variation patterns.
Assess dependency concentration and local consistency within features e8-e12 to distinguish behavioral signals from sampling bias.
Examine joint relations and potential confounding effects between packet length features e8-e12 and low cardinality features e23-e32.
Evaluate stability of class-conditioned structural variations in packet length features e8-e12 across multiple data partitions to confirm robustness.
